question: 2026年3月每天发生多少事故？
raw_output: {"strategy": "g3_direct", "primary_table": "gold.dws_daily_crash_summary", "joins": [{"table": "gold.dim_date", "on": "gold.dim_date.date = gold.dws_daily_crash_summary.crash_date", "type": "INNER"}], "where_clauses": ["gold.dim_date.date BETWEEN DATE '2026-03-01' AND DATE '2026-03-31'"], "group_by": ["gold.dim_date.date"], "order_by": ["gold.dim_date.date"], "aggregations": [{"expr": "SUM(crash_count)", "alias": "crash_count"}], "limit": null, "downgrade_reason": null, "confidence": 0.95}
